selections.name: JJ XAVIER
selections.reason: Draws the sweet spot at Mohawk (Post 6) and gets a major driver upgrade. Stalking trip expected.

selections.name: UNCLE SHANK A
selections.reason: Massive class relief tonight dropping from Op50000. Will likely blast off the gate despite the wide draw.

selections.name: PHONE NINE ONE ONE
selections.reason: Steps up in class but comes off two straight dominating wins. Rail post can be tricky but form is undeniable.

selections.name: WANNABEABIGSTAR
selections.reason: Won last start with a sub-27.2 final quarter. Post 10 is tough but has the late speed to hit the ticket.

danger_horse.name: BETTOR B GOING
danger_horse.reason: Comes in off two blowout wins. Steps up several levels but has the early speed to control the pace.

selections.name: DR DAVE
selections.reason: Draws perfectly in Post 5. Looked good winning a leg of the Spring Series and should be positioned close to the front.

selections.name: PLANKTON HANOVER
selections.reason: Broke stride last start while making an aggressive move. Forgive the break; capable of a big rebound.

selections.name: D A LETS BOOGIE
selections.reason: Produced his best effort of the season last start racing first-over. Improving gelding draws well.

selections.name: SOLAR VOLTAGE
selections.reason: Finished off rookie season in style. Qualified well but stepping up into NW2 is a test.

danger_horse.name: THIRTY SIX RED
danger_horse.reason: Consistent performer who finished a solid second last start. Can hit the board with the right trip.

selections.name: MAKEMBLUSH HANOVER
selections.reason: Faced a razor-sharp rival last week as the heavy favorite. Looks best in this field despite the outside draw.

selections.name: CACKLE BERRY
selections.reason: Flew late to get second at 25-1 in her sophomore debut. Major contender if she repeats that effort.

selections.name: PEARL WASH
selections.reason: Draws the sweet spot (Post 6). Made a wide move to break her maiden three back; better post helps today.

selections.name: BARB LAHEY
selections.reason: Closed in 25.3 last start in a much-improved effort. Has gate speed to overcome the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: TWIN B FIERCE
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw can be tricky, but she has the back class to factor if she gets away cleanly.

selections.name: FRANCO SANTANA N
selections.reason: Notable class drop tonight and draws perfectly in Post 6. Paced in 1:51.2 last start; aggressive steer expected.

selections.name: WHATCHULOOKIN AT
selections.reason: Gets another class drop. Rail post is a slight negative, but figures to contend strongly if he avoids getting shuffled.

selections.name: LIVINTHEBEACHLIFE
selections.reason: Three wins already this season. Drops in class here and can improve enough to land in the exotics.

selections.name: RBSTENACIOUS T
selections.reason: Dropping on paper. Will likely drop back early and try to pass them all late; good for the bottom of the ticket.

danger_horse.name: BETS SHOW OFF
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and has tactical speed. Could spice up the exotics at a price.

selections.name: BRANDON BLVD
selections.reason: Elite colt who took a 1:48.4 mark here last year. Draws the best post and doesn't have to face Beau Jangles tonight.

selections.name: SWEET LOVIN LOU
selections.reason: Third in the $1M Metro Stakes last year. Got a good tightener two weeks ago pacing a 53.2 back half.

selections.name: NO WAITLIST
selections.reason: Showed blazing speed last week in OSS Gold. Will be put into play early and can ride a good trip to a share.

selections.name: SCORPION SEELSTER
selections.reason: Coming off a win and draws well. Has the speed to mix it up with the top contenders.

danger_horse.name: BORDERLINE MOBBY
danger_horse.reason: First-over against Beau Jangles in his last two. Wide post means he'll be back early, but can close for a slice.

selections.name: CODENAME CIGAR BOX
selections.reason: Dropping in class and starting from one of the best posts. Likely to blast right to the front.

selections.name: JACK PANIC
selections.reason: Drops back down to the NW6000 level where he dominated four starts back. Aggressive steer expected.

selections.name: AQUINAS HANOVER
selections.reason: Made a nice late move to get third last week kicking in 26.4 over a wet track. Strong closer.

selections.name: SILVERWALLS
selections.reason: Terrific season last year. Finished second in this class in his 4YO debut; tactical speed from the rail.

danger_horse.name: P L OZZY
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and has the back class to be a factor if the pace melts down.

selections.name: MR WALNER FASHION
selections.reason: Terrific this spring winning four of five. Took a 1:51.2 mark at Meadowlands last year; prime upset candidate.

selections.name: MR MOUTON
selections.reason: Fast at three with a 1:50.1 mark. Got a good tightener on May 15th; big speed threat despite the outside draw.

selections.name: HEY PORTER
selections.reason: Faces considerably easier here after tackling the best older trotters on the continent. Menary barn is potent.

selections.name: MANOAH
selections.reason: Draws the sweet spot and has been racing consistently. Can hit the ticket at a price.

danger_horse.name: EUROBANK HANOVER
danger_horse.reason: Seems to have solved his breaking issues (3-1-1 from five starts this year). Good following trip expected.

selections.name: CHRISTOPHER DANCE N
selections.reason: Heavy hitters Pollack Racing bought him; moves to Menary barn. Adds Lasix. Elite speed, just needs to overcome Post 10.

selections.name: CAPTAIN FEAR NOT
selections.reason: Impressive in defeat last time, flying down the middle of the track after losing momentum. Sharp gelding.

selections.name: SAULSBROOK VICTOR
selections.reason: Proven front-runner at this class level. Will almost certainly blast off the gate; the one to catch.

selections.name: ROCHESTER FLASH
selections.reason: Moves inside after a wide draw last time. Can sit a trip and close for a slice.

danger_horse.name: RIPASSO
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and has the closing kick to pick up the pieces if the pace is too hot.

selections.name: PRINCE HAL HANOVER
selections.reason: Earned over $1M at 3. Won the Juravinski Final with a heady steer. The one to beat.

selections.name: BRUNO NO NO NO
selections.reason: Terrific since moving to Menary barn. Lowered mark to 1:48.1. Obvious threat to the top pick.

selections.name: SUGAR MAN
selections.reason: Took early command in the Juravinski Final at 16-1. Sharp and draws well, but faces two monsters.

selections.name: AYEAYE CAPTAIN DEO
selections.reason: Sneaky good effort in the Juravinski Final pacing his last 3/4s in 1:21.2. Strong closer for the exotics.

danger_horse.name: SABA ROCK
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw gives him a chance to save ground and sneak into the Superfecta.

selections.name: MAJOR MIKI
selections.reason: Hasn't missed the board in his career. Good second to OSS Gold winner Johnny Angel last time. Can lead all the way despite Post 10.

selections.name: DYLANS VETT
selections.reason: Roared down the middle to win at 36-1 two back. Reproduced his 27.2 closing quarter last start; big price potential.

selections.name: EXACTLY CORRECT
selections.reason: Leading driver James Macdonald chose him over the 10-horse. Qualified nicely; dangerous if he drops a second.

selections.name: ONE LUCKY BEACH
selections.reason: Won his sophomore debut lowering his mark by 3 seconds. Forgive the last start; capable of much better.

danger_horse.name: JASPER HILL
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and has shown flashes of ability. Could hit the ticket at a price.

selections.name: AXIAL
selections.reason: Great form against NW3 before stepping up last week. Drops back to a winning level and will likely control the pace.

selections.name: BACKUP PLAN
selections.reason: One of the best closers in the race. Closed in 26.1 to win three back. Will fly late if the pace is hot.

selections.name: BLAZING CRUISER
selections.reason: Similar profile to Axial. Raced well in this class two back. Consistent slice-getter.

selections.name: MAJOR THREAT
selections.reason: Almost pulled off a big upset two starts back. Wide draw isn't terrible if he can clear and sit the pocket.

danger_horse.name: SOS SPORTS BET
danger_horse.reason: Draws the sweet spot and has tactical speed to be in the mix.

selections.name: CHAIN GANG
selections.reason: Raced very well two starts back from the 11-hole. Paced a 53.1 back half last week. Draws well today; top billing.

selections.name: LEGION SEELSTER
selections.reason: Scored a huge 29-1 upset at this level four back. Drops back down and draws perfectly; square price expected.

selections.name: JABBERWOCKY
selections.reason: Crushed last week after stealing a 31.1 second quarter. Faces tougher today but will flash speed.

selections.name: BLUE HUNT
selections.reason: Produced a much better effort when dropping to this level two back. Gets a driver upgrade to Cullen.

danger_horse.name: JMR SPEAK AWAY
danger_horse.reason: Rarely misses a cheque. Consistent gelding who can sneak into the bottom of the exotics at a big price.
